{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/135195424?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/CE2Sec/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/CE2Sec/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/CE2Sec/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/CE2Sec/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/CE2Sec", "id": 135195424, "login": "CE2Sec", "node_id": "U_kgDOCA7rIA", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/CE2Sec/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/CE2Sec/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/CE2Sec/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/CE2Sec/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/CE2Sec/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/CE2Sec", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44833", "cvss": {"score": 5.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:A/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:A/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-601", "name": "URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect')"}], "description": "Open redirect vulnerability in Snipe-IT allows attackers to redirect users to malicious sites via unvalidated HTTP Referer header stored in session variable.

### Impact

-   **Phishing**: Redirect users to fake login pages to steal credentials
-   **Session Hijacking**: Redirect to attacker site that captures session cookies via JavaScript
-   **Malware Distribution**: Redirect to sites hosting malware or drive-by downloads
-   **Reputation Damage**: Users lose trust when redirected to malicious sites from legitimate application
-   **Social Engineering**: Use trusted Snipe-IT domain to increase phishing success rate

When the user clicks "Save", the application: 
1. Processes the form 
2. Checks `redirect_option` (if set to 'back') 
3. Calls `Helper::getRedirectOption()` 
4. Retrieves `back_url` from session: `https://evil.com/phishing?target=snipeit` 
5. Executes `redirect()->to($backUrl)` 
6. User is redirected to attacker's site

This would still require session poisoning, so the actual practical threat here is minimal. 

### Patches
Patched in https://github.com/grokability/snipe-it/commit/e37649212861a337e68a624e589c3540b7a82373, released in 8.4.1.

### Workarounds
 None.

### Resources
-   CWE-601: URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect')
-   OWASP: Unvalidated Redirects and Forwards
-   Laravel Security: Safe Redirects

title: Snipe-IT has an open redirect vulnerability
